output.code:
# Let's attempt to read the provided text file and locate citation spans.
path = "/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt"
text = None
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

len(text), text[:2000]

# Try opening the file mentioned by the system message.
import os, glob, json, textwrap
glob.glob("/mnt/data/*")[:10]

path = "/mnt/data/file-3JZQULQ3myXSg3QWe1LVgW-Q055.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text)

# Let's view the text to ensure it matches the user's message and find quote positions.
print(text)

# Find positions of double quotes
quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
quote_positions, len(quote_positions)

# Extract the text between the quotes and compute slices accordingly.
first_start_quote, first_end_quote, second_start_quote, second_end_quote = quote_positions

first_span_start = first_start_quote + 1
first_span_end = first_end_quote  # exclusive
first_span_text = text[first_span_start:first_span_end]

second_span_start = second_start_quote + 1
second_span_end = second_end_quote  # exclusive
second_span_text = text[second_span_start:second_span_end]

first_span_start, first_span_end, first_span_text[:100], "\n...\n", second_span_start, second_span_end, second_span_text[:100]

queries: وَنَزَعْنَا مِن كُلِّ عَدوٍّ هَيهَاتَ قِيلَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا رَبَّنا هَذَا الَّذِي أَعْطَيتَ مُستَخْلَفاً وَكَفى بِرَبِّكَ وَكيلاً وَكَذَلِكَ نَجْزِي الْمُكَذِّبِينَ
لا تُحِبُّوا الزقوم فإنه يحب حديث
ثم إنكم أيها الضالون المكذبون لآكلون من شجر من زقوم

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":216,"span_end":383,"span_text":"وَنَزَعْنَا مِن كُلِّ عَدوٍّ هَيهَاتَ قِيلَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا رَبَّنا هَذَا الَّذِي أَعْطَيتَ مُستَخْلَفاً وَكَفى بِرَبِّكَ وَكيلاً وَكَذَلِكَ نَجْزِي الْمُكَذِّبِينَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الواقعة","sura_number":56,"aya_number":19},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":533,"span_end":729,"span_text":"لا تُحِبُّوا الزقوم، فإنه يُحِبُّ، وَلَكِنَّهُ مِن شُجرة الجَنَّةِ، وَإِنَّهُ يُحِبُّ وَلا يُؤَذى، وَإِنَّهُ لَيُؤَذى وَلا يُحِبُّ، وَإِنَّهُ لَيُحِبُّ وَلا يُؤَذى، وَإِنَّهُ لَيُؤَذى وَلا يُحِبُّ","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
